zh.Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾比格亞
zh.Brechin, Angus, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭安格斯布雷
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean Barclay於1329年出生在英國蘇格蘭安格斯布雷時，她的父親David Barclay36歲，母親Margaret Brechin26歲。她於1351年之前與Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1399年11月8日在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾比格亞享年70歲。

zh-hans.Brechin, Angus, Scotland: 英国苏格兰安格斯布雷
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean Barclay于1329年出生在英国苏格兰安格斯布雷时，她的父亲David Barclay36岁，母亲Margaret Brechin26岁。她于1351年之前与Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1399年11月8日在英国苏格兰藍納可爾比格亞享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barclay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Barkley
meanings: English and northern Irish (Antrim): variant of   Barclay  .
Americanized form of German   Berkel   or of some other similar (like-sounding) German surname.

variants.name: Barclift
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Scottish   Barclay  .

variants.name: Berkeley
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Brickley
meanings: English and Irish: metathesized form of   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean Barclay was born in 1329, in Brechin, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, David Barclay, was 36 and her mother, Margaret Brechin, was 26. She married Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar before 1351, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 8 November 1399, in Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean Barclay est née en 1329, à Brechin, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, David Barclay, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Brechin, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar avant 1351, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 novembre 1399, à Biggar, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean Barclay 1329 in Brechin, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David Barclay 36 und ihre Mutter Margaret Brechin 26. Sie hat vor 1351 in Scotland Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. November 1399 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Biggar, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Barclay è nata il nel 1329 nel Brechin, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, David Barclay, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Margaret Brechin, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar prima del 1351, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 8 novembre 1399, nel Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean Barclayが1329年にイギリススコットランドアンガスブレチンで生まれた時，父David Barclayは36歳，母Margaret Brechinは26歳であった。1351年以前にスコットランドでSir David Fleming Lord of Biggarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1399年11月8日にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアビグガーで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean Barclay(이)가 1329년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 브레친에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David Barclay(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Brechin(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1351년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1399년 11월 8일 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 비가에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Barclay nasceu em 1329, em Brechin, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, David Barclay, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Brechin, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar antes 1351, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1399, em Biggar, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean Barclay родилась в 1329 г. в местности бречин, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени David Barclay было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Brechin, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar перед 1351 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 8 ноября 1399 г. в местности бигар, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean Barclay nació en 1329, en Brechin, Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, David Barclay, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret Brechin, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir David Fleming Lord of Biggar antes de 1351, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de noviembre de 1399, en Biggar, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años.
